scope.target: Example evidence tiers, provenance-aware classification, catalogs, and duplicated fixtures
constraints: Do not equate provenance with verification
Every retained executable example needs an appropriate test
Documentation-only examples need no test but cannot claim executable verification
Do not create a reference product solely to obtain executable evidence
Preserve deliberate BDDfy and Gherkin modes
non_goals: Convert the full portfolio before plan review

steps: Classify Java/EzDDD/Lab material by provenance and active role
Test only retained executable artifacts with real build routes
Use minimal inline analyzer/validator inputs for deterministic rules
After review, consolidate catalogs and shared fixtures
validation: No untested executable item labeled verified
No historical provenance treated as current product truth
execution.last_completed_step: Revised the MVP to avoid a committed reference product and use evidence-tier classification instead.
